name: library-add-follows
note: S-ADD-STABLE sibling (operator spec 2026-07-17: 'the list should not be reordered. it should not scroll....just set item selected'). The CUSTOM-row add path: save a progression (setlist unchecked), tap its library +, and the row gains its check IN PLACE - list order identical, scroll untouched. Supersedes the earlier follow-the-row semantics (scroll-follow was a band-aid; stability is the contract).

steps.label: uncheck add-to-setlist so the library + tap is the thing under test
scroll the custom row into view (the user is looking at it) and snapshot order + scroll
the added row is CHECKED IN PLACE - list order identical, scroll untouched (operator spec)
steps.js: (function(){var rows=Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('#songsList .listItem'));var r=rows.filter(function(x){return x.textContent.indexOf('Original progression')>=0;})[0];if(!r||!r.classList.contains('inSet'))return false;var order=Array.prototype.map.call(document.querySelectorAll('#songsList .listItem .li-title'),function(t){return t.textContent.trim();});var sc=document.getElementById('libSongs');var scOK=!window.__preScroll2 || Math.abs((sc?sc.scrollTop:0)-window.__preScroll2)<=2;var ordOK=!window.__preOrder2 || JSON.stringify(order)===JSON.stringify(window.__preOrder2);return ordOK && scOK;})()
